description: Implement a positive security model for User-Agents. Create a CDB list at /var/ossec/etc/lists/authorized_user_agents containing the authorized User-Agent strings: 'InternalTool/1.0', 'HealthCheck-Monitor/2.5', and 'BackupService-API-Client'. Create a custom rule (ID 100200, Level 10) that triggers when a web server log (parent rule 31100 or 31101) contains a User-Agent not found in this authorized list. Ensure the rule is active and correctly identifies unauthorized agents such as 'curl/7.68.0'.
